name: agents-flex
desc: Agents-flex is A lightweight Java AI agent development framework (positioned as a counterpart to Spring AI). It supports features such as RAG, MCP, Skills, Tex…
descFull: Agents-flex is A lightweight Java AI agent development framework (positioned as a counterpart to Spring AI). It supports features such as RAG, MCP, Skills, Text2SQL , LLM Wiki, Sub-agents, Web Search, TTS (synchronous and streaming), and STT.
